title: Penalty
description: The discipline / penalty outcome for a substantiated complaint — including the Administrative Prosecution Unit (APU) trial track and the NYPD's final penalty decision. Canonical schema reconciling the 'Civilian Complaint Review Board: Penalties' dataset (keep-pkmh, 13 columns). Joins to Complaint on Complaint Id and to PoliceOfficer on Tax ID.

complaintId.description: Complaint identifier ('Complaint Id') — primary key together with Tax ID.

taxId.description: NYPD Tax ID of the disciplined officer ('Tax ID').

ccrbSubstantiatedOfficerDisposition.description: CCRB substantiated officer disposition ('CCRB Substantiated Officer Disposition').

boardDisciplineRecommendation.description: The CCRB Board's discipline recommendation ('Board Discipline Recommendation').

isApu.description: Whether the case went through the Administrative Prosecution Unit ('Officer is_APU').

apuTrialRecommendedPenalty.description: APU CCRB trial recommended penalty ('APU CCRB Trial Recommended Penalty').

apuTrialCommissionerRecommendedPenalty.description: APU trial commissioner recommended penalty ('APU Trial Commissioner Recommended Penalty').

apuPleaAgreedPenalty.description: APU plea agreed penalty ('APU Plea Agreed Penalty').

nypdOfficerPenalty.description: The NYPD's final penalty imposed on the officer ('NYPD Officer Penalty').

nonApuNypdPenaltyReportDate.description: Non-APU NYPD penalty report date ('Non-APU NYPD Penalty Report Date').
